name: Encoded PowerShell Launched From Office
description: Detects encoded PowerShell commands, especially suspicious when launched from Office applications.
analyst_guidance: Check parent process, command content, user context, and whether the document source is trusted.

name: SSH Brute Force Followed By Success
description: Detects repeated failed SSH authentication followed by successful access.
analyst_guidance: Validate the source IP, reset exposed credentials, review login history, and check for post-login commands.

name: Suspicious DNS Query
description: Detects DNS lookups to suspicious or newly registered domains in the lab feed.
analyst_guidance: Review browser history, proxy logs, process lineage, and other hosts querying the same domain.

name: Service Account Added To Domain Admins
description: Detects high-impact privilege escalation through privileged group membership changes.
analyst_guidance: Confirm change approval, review the actor host, remove unauthorized access, and hunt for related account changes.
